TaskDefinition.name: ASC-SEQ-Aggregation-FULL

entry.value: AA-DB-Peoplesoft-HCM-Primary, AA-AD-ACMHO FULL no Optimization, AA-AD-AHSCN FULL No Optimization, AA-AD-KSWIC FULL No Optimization, AA-AD-MIROC FULL No Optimization, AA-AD-OKTUL FULL No Optimization, AA-AD-WIAPP FULL No Optimization, AA-AD-WIGLE FULL No Optimization, AA-AD-DS FULL no Optimization, AA-AD-AID FULL no Optimization, AA-AD-AMITA FULL no Optimization, AA-AD-PRESENCEHEALTH FULL no Optimization, AA-DUO, AA-Azure, AA-GSuite-FULL

TaskDefinition.Description: Template for creating a task that runs multiple other tasks.
